content: What's on my plate today?

Good morning! Here's your Monday overview: You have work 9-5 as usual. Eleanor's bi-weekly check-in is overdue (was due March 6). Sarah Chen's monthly catch-up is also overdue. Mochi probably needs feeding. Want me to help you plan anything?
Can you remind me to buy cat food on Saturday?
Done! I've set a reminder for Saturday March 21 to buy cat food. You'll get it at 7:30am as usual.
What do you know about James?

James Ko is a colleague — team lead on the backend team, and he's into rock climbing. You last caught up on March 1st over lunch after a sprint retro. His birthday is coming up on March 22nd, just 6 days away! Want me to set a reminder to get him something?
Yeah good idea, remind me the day before
Set! You'll get a reminder on March 21 to sort a birthday gift for James. Given he's into rock climbing, maybe a chalk bag or a day pass to a climbing gym?
What's the latest household note?

The most recent note is from March 14: "Alice has dentist appointment Thursday 10am." Before that, on March 10: you and Bob discussed the kitchen renovation — he wants new countertops and you'd prefer to keep costs under $3k.
What's on my plate today?
Let me pull up your notes and memory fresh!

Here's what's on your plate today (Monday, March 16):

- 🏢 **Work** — 9–5 at the agency
- 📞 **Eleanor** — bi-weekly check-in is overdue (was due March 6)
- 📞 **Sarah Chen** — monthly catch-up is overdue (was due Feb 19)
- 🐱 **Mochi** — don't forget to feed her!

No specific notes for today. Want help knocking any of those catch-ups off the list?
What's on my plate today?

Here's your Monday, March 16:

- 🏢 **Work** — 9–5 at the agency
- 📞 **Eleanor** — bi-weekly check-in overdue since March 6
- 📞 **Sarah Chen** — monthly catch-up overdue since February 19
- 🐱 **Mochi** — feed the cat!

Want me to help you reach out to Eleanor or Sarah today?
can you search the web for the best chocolate chip cookie recipe?
Sure thing!

Hmm, the web search isn't cooperating right now — I'm getting an auth error. 

That said, I can check if we've already saved any cookie recipes in your bookmarks! Want me to do that instead?
can you read https://example.com and tell me what's on it?

Nothing exciting there! 😄 It's the **Example Domain** — a placeholder site maintained by IANA. It just says:

> *"This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission."*

It's basically the internet's dummy URL used for testing and documentation. Want to try a different link?
remind me to clean the toilet every 3 days

You already have a "Clean the bathroom" reminder every 7 days — would you like me to add a separate one just for the toilet every 3 days, or would you rather update the existing bathroom reminder instead?
remind me to clean the toilet every 3 days
Done! I'll remind you to clean the toilet every 3 days starting today. 🚽
First reminder will nudge you at 7:30am on March 19, then every 3 days after that!
yes add a separate one
It looks like I already went ahead and added it just before you confirmed — sorry for jumping the gun! The reminder is set: **Clean the toilet every 3 days**, starting March 16. You're all good! 🚽
